1057.issue: [E1057] admin 6.0.0 listed as dependency but 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please update globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/io-package.json).

2002.issue: [W2002] Version of [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/package.json) (8.2.0) doesn't match latest version on [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.web) (8.1.0)

2004.issue: [E2004] Version "8.2.0" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.web). Please remove from news section.

3001.issue: [S3001] "@iobroker/legacy-testing" is used. Consider migrating to "@iobroker/testing" for better support.

4036.issue: [S4036] Consider adding .vscode/settings.json file with JSON schema definitions for better development experience with Visual Studio Code.

5043.issue: [S5043] Package "crypto" is a built-in Node.js module. Please use "node:crypto" instead.

5048.issue: [W5048] ".eslintrc.json" is most likely obsolete when using "@iobroker/eslint-config". Please remove it.

5049.issue: [E5049] process.env is used in source files (src-login/src/serviceWorker.ts, src-www/src/serviceWorker.ts). process.env is incompatible with compact mode. Please use adapter configuration instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/io-package.json).

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#652] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/issues/652)

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json, /src-login/package.json, /src-www/package.json), but no npm dependabot entry matches affected directories. Add matching "directory" or "directories" entries.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

9507.issue: [E9507] i18n directory "src-www/src/i18n" found in repository but is not included in [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/package.json) "files". Translations will be missing from the npm package.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/package.json).

0050.issue: [W0050] Package 'axios' listed as devDependency at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/package.json) might be obsolete if using '@iobroker/adapter-dev'.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.9.1" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
